title: スプリンターズSの後に・証明？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and Nishino Flower have been
neck-and-neck whenever they compete, but
Bakushin O manages to win by a hair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, after I encourage her to defeat Nishino
Flower by a staggering margin, Sakura Bakushin
O's passion heats up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deeply touched by my words, she aims for the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen, looking to face Nishino
Flower once more.
